PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:15672 -TimeoutSec 2 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "rabbit-mgmt-ok status=$\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "rabbit-mgmt-no: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 27017\); "mongo-tcp-ok"; $tcp.Close\(\) } catch { "mongo-tcp-no" }; try { $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 5672\); "rabbit-amqp-ok"; $tcp.Close\(\) } catch { "rabbit-amqp-no" })

PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 5672\); "ok" } catch { "5672 closed" }; try { $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 5673\); "ok 5673" } catch { "5673 closed" }; try { $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 15672\); "ok 15672" } catch { "15672 closed" })
PowerShell(wsl --status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 10; wsl -- which rabbitmq-server 2>&1; wsl -- rabbitmqctl status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($ports = @\(5672, 15672, 6379, 27017\); foreach \($p in $ports\) { try { $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $tcp.Connect\("localhost", $p\); "OK $p"; $tcp.Close\(\) } catch { "FAIL $p $\($_.Exception.Message.Split\([Environment]::NewLine\)[0]\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 27017\); $ns = $tcp.GetStream\(\); $ns.ReadTimeout = 1500; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; if \($ns.DataAvailable\) { $buf = New-Object byte[] 256; $n = $ns.Read\($buf, 0, 256\); "got $n bytes" } else { "open but no data" }; $tcp.Close\(\) } catch { "ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(tasklist /FI "PID eq 9068" /FO LIST; "----"; tasklist /FI "PID eq 3036" /FO LIST)
